_commentXRP: This line does not need to be translated; add specific XRP translation below
bluetooth-not-supported: Bluetooth is not supported in your browser or system. Please use a different browser or system to access the full functionality of the XRPCode IDE.
file-exists-on-python-convert: Python file {{ filename }} is already exists. Please rename it before performing conversion.
firefox-not-supported: The browser ({{ browser }}) that you are using is not supported. Please use a different browser such as Chrome or Edge to access the full functionality of the XRPCode IDE.
selectConnection: Please select your desired connection to begin...
firmwareBackupPromptBody1: Updating firmware or switching to a different project can replace or remove the files currently on your XRP.
firmwareBackupPromptBody2: If your XRP is running a project that lets you connect to XRPCode, you may want to connect and back up your files first so you don't lose any work.
firmwareLoaderLoadError: Could not load firmware loader data.
firmwareLoaderNoOptions: No options at this step yet. Use Back to return.
firmwareLoaderProjectUnavailable: {{ name }} is not yet available. Check back soon.
firmwareWizardAssetsError: Could not load install step images. Check that wizard-assets.json is available and try again.
firmwareWizardStep1Body: Power off your XRP and disconnect it from your computer.
firmwareWizardStep1Body_nano: Power off your XRP, the green LED must be off.
firmwareWizardStep2Body: Hold the BOOTSEL button while you connect it to your computer via USB. Then release the BOOT SEL button
firmwareWizardStep2Body_nano: Hold the "B" button (the boot button) while you turn the robot back on by pressing the red toggle switch. Then release the boot button.
firmwareWizardStep3Body: Click the button below and pick the drive named {{ drive }} (or your board’s USB drive) so the app can write firmware.uf2. If your browser asks for permission to view or edit files on the drive, choose Edit files or Allow.
firmwareWizardUf2Title:
Copying firmware
 please be patient it may take a few minutes
firmwareWizardUf2Wait: Wait until the copy finishes; the board will restart when done.
firmwareWizardLibsTitle:
Updating files on the robot
 please be patient it may take a few minutes
firmwareWizardConnectBody: Plug in USB and wait for the robot to reconnect. If it does not connect within two minutes, unplug and try again, then use Retry below.
firmwareWizardManualConnectBody: The robot did not reconnect automatically. This is normal the first time you connect this XRP to this browser. Click below and pick your XRP from the list.
firmwareWizardConnectTimeout: Timed out waiting for USB. Check the cable and connection, then retry.
firmwareWizardNoFolder: Choose the boot drive folder first.
firmwareWizardNoFolderPicker: Your browser does not support choosing a folder. Try Chrome or Edge.
firmwareWizardWrongDrive: You picked '{{ picked }}', which is the boot drive of a different XRP processor. This firmware is for '{{ expected }}'. Pick the matching boot drive instead. Or exit the firmware loader and select the correct XRP board.
firmwareWizardSuccessBody: Firmware (and any selected files) were installed. You can return to the IDE when you are ready.
googleLoginTooltip: Sign in with your Google account to access files stored in Google Drive.
googlogoutTooltip: Sign out of your Google account.
not-google-drive-file: This file can not be saved to Google Drive because it was not associated with Google Drive! Please try saving it to XRP!
googleDriveNotification: When using Google Drive from XRPCode, all folders and files created will be owned by the Google account that is logged in. If you add Google Drive folders or files directly through your Google Drive account, these files are not visible in XRPCode.
chooseNewFile: Please choose a destination folder, the File Type, and file name
chooseNewFile2: Please choose a name to create a new file...
chooseNewFolder: Please choose a name to create a new folder...
settingDescription: Adjust settings and press save to apply changes.
fileExists: The filename is used or invalid, please choose a different name!
file-exists-error-multi: A file or folder with the name '{{ filenames }}' already exists. Please choose a different destination.
directoryExists: Folder name is used or invalid, please choose a different name.
power-switch-alerts: The power switch on the XRP is not on. Motors and Servos will not work properly. Please turn on the switch before continuing.
XRP-not-connected: Your XRP is not connected. Please connect the XRP to your computer and try again.
driver-install-login: Please logout from Google Drive before attempting to install drivers!
sad-battery-desc: The XRP Batteries are low. Please replace the batteries!
no-activetab: Please select the file tab you want to operate on and try again
choose-dest-file: Choose a destination folder and File Name
update-desc: The system has detected that an update is needed for the XRP
update-MP: A new version of Micropython is available. Click OK to update.
update-lib: A new version of the XRP Library is available. Click OK to update.
updateAvailableMpTooltip: A new MicroPython version is available ({{current}} → {{next}}). Click to view release notes. Use the Firmware Loader to update.
updateAvailableLibTooltip: A new XRP library version is available ({{current}} → {{next}}). Click to view release notes. Use the Firmware Loader to update.
updateAvailableMustMpTooltip: Your XRP needs a MicroPython update before the library can be refreshed. Click to view release notes. Use the Firmware Loader to update.
update-inst: For best results, it is recommended that you connect the XRP to your computer via USB cable for the software update process.
convert-to-python-desc: This action will convert the current Blocks program to a Python program. Your Blocks program will be put in the trash folder and a new Python program will be created. Are you sure that you want to proceed?
update-mp-instructions: When the folder selection dialog comes up, select the {{ drive }} drive in the file browser, then click 'OK'. When ask for permission to save, click 'View files' and 'Save Changes'. The update process will take a few minutes. Please do not disconnect the USB cable during this time.
update-mp-error: The XRP Micropython update process has failed. Please try again. The error message is: {{ error }}
update-mp-complete: The XRP Micropython update process has completed successfully.
update-lib-instructions: The update process will take a few minutes. Please do not disconnect the USB cable until the process is complete.
update-lib-error: The XRP library update process has failed. Please try again. The error message is: {{ error }}
update-lib-complete: The XRP library update process has completed successfully.
no-editor-run: No active editor session are running!
login-desc: The user mode is currently configured to Google User. Please login to your Google Account to edit your files. Click the Google Sign In Button below.
driver-install-desc: The list below shows third party drivers that can be installed on the XRP. Please select the desired drivers and click the 'Install Driver' button to begin the installation process. Note that your XRP must be connected before installing any drivers.
alertOpenPortFailed: Opening port failed, is another application accessing this device/port?
confirmDeleteFileOrFolder: Are you sure you want to delete '{{ name }}' ? This action cannot be undone.
confirmDeleteTab: This file has unsaved changes. Are you sure you want to close it?
select-parent-node: Please select a parent node to create the new folder or file under.

aiChat.startConversationHelper: Ask questions, get help with code, or learn XRP robotics with XRPCode Buddy.

editor.saveconnect: To save a file, please connect to the XRP or login to your Google Drive account.

backup-restore.title: Backup/Restore
backup-restore.description: Backup or restore your XRP Robot files. Click the button below to begin. Note that your XRP must be connected and your Google Drive account must be logged in before performing a backup or restore.
backup-restore.bluetooth-warning: Backup and restore operations via Bluetooth will be slow. It is recommended that you connect the XRP to your computer via USB cable to perform these operations.

backup.title: Backup
backup.description: Backup XRP Robot files to Google Drive.

restore.title: Restore
restore.description: Restore XRP Robot files from Google Drive.
